class.name: RiderLocator
class.brief_description: Discovers installed JetBrains Rider IDEs on the local machine.
class.description: Asynchronously scans the system for installed JetBrains Rider IDEs and reports the results via the [signal installations_loaded] signal. The scan runs off the main thread so the editor stays responsive. Each instance is single-shot: call [method start_search] once, then either consume the signal or drop the reference. The search is cancelled automatically when the object is freed.

method.name: start_search
method.description: Begins the asynchronous search. Calling this more than once on the same instance is a no-op.

signal.name: installations_loaded
signal.description: Emitted on the main thread once the search finishes. [param installations] is an array of [Dictionary] entries, each with a [code]path[/code] (absolute path to the Rider executable) and a [code]display[/code] (human-readable label including the version).
